# Exercise 1 Min

Exercise 1 Min is the official public website for a coming-soon mobile app for one-minute exercise breaks. The app is designed for people who sit too much, especially desk workers, students, people in meetings, and people who want a small exercise habit without a full workout plan.

The public site is production-ready and available for crawling and indexing.

## Core Message

One minute of exercise, on repeat.

Exercise 1 Min gives a gentle reminder to take a quick exercise break for under a minute every hour or two while you are at a desk. It does not require a gym, equipment, accounts, or pressure.

Short version: less sitting, more exercise.

## How It Works

1. A gentle reminder: every 1, 2, or 3 hours within the hours you choose, a calm notification reminds you to exercise. You can snooze or skip freely.
2. One minute of exercises: tap start and get a handful of quick, illustrated exercises. There is no ticking timer. Do the exercises at your own pace and tap Done.
3. Back to your day: a little exercise is logged and a quiet streak grows. There are no calories, leaderboards, or pressure mechanics.

## Features

- Gentle reminders on your schedule.
- Illustrated exercises with original animated figures.
- Quiet progress with exercises, minutes, and a gentle streak.
- Offline-first privacy.
- No accounts or sign-up.
- Light and dark mode.
- The core app is planned to be free.

## Sample Exercises

- High Knees: 40 seconds.
- Squats: 15 reps.
- Arm Circles: 30 seconds.
- Calf Raises: 20 reps.
- Plank Hold: 30 seconds.
- Jumping Jacks: 40 seconds.
- Chest Expansions: 30 seconds.
- Lunges: 12 reps.
- Shoulder Taps: 20 reps.
- Stretches: 40 seconds.
- Bridges: 15 reps.
- Wide Arm Circles: 30 seconds.

## FAQ

### What is Exercise 1 Min?

Exercise 1 Min is a coming-soon mobile app for one-minute exercise breaks. It reminds people who sit at a desk to stand up, do a few simple exercises, and get back to their day.

### Do I need equipment or a gym?

No. The app focuses on bodyweight exercises you can do at home, at work, or beside a desk with no equipment.

### How often should I take an exercise break?

You choose the rhythm. The app can remind you every 1, 2, or 3 hours during the hours you select, and you can snooze or skip any reminder.

### Is Exercise 1 Min private?

Yes. The app is designed to work offline with no accounts and no sign-up, so your exercise history stays on your device.

### Is Exercise 1 Min free?

The core app is planned to be free, with no ads, subscriptions, or upsell during the moment you are meant to exercise.

### When will the app be available?

Exercise 1 Min is coming soon for iOS and Android. The website will be updated when the app is ready to download.

## Safety

Stop if you feel pain or discomfort. Exercise 1 Min does not replace professional health advice.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://exercise1min.com
- LLM guide: https://exercise1min.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://exercise1min.com/sitemap.xml
